pw_msg_notravel: Something you carry prevents the flight
pw_msg_canttravel: Wait a moment before your next flight
pw_msg_travel_inside: The flight will begin once you are outside. Waiting: $1
pw_ward_offering_surtlingcore_descriptio: feed an old flame to the ward, and damaged structures across ward-linked ground will be mended
pw_ward_offering_blackcore_description: place a black core at the ward, and its buried power will strengthen nearby structures
pw_ward_offering_food_description: share food with the ward, and gentle healing will pass to allies and tamed creatures
pw_ward_offering_mead_description: pour mead before the ward, and its blessing will reach players on ward-linked ground
pw_ward_offering_thunderstone_descriptio: offer a thunder stone, and the ward will wake the storm against enemies on ward-linked ground
pw_ward_offering_trophies_description: hang a trophy before the ward, and creatures of the same kind on ward-linked ground will perish
pw_ward_offering_bosstrophies_descriptio: show a boss trophy to summon a Valkyrie for a flight to the Sacrificial Stones
pw_ward_offering_bosstrophies_consumed_d: offer a boss trophy to summon a Valkyrie for a flight to the Sacrificial Stones
pw_ward_offering_ymirremains_description: lay Ymir flesh at the ward, and crops on ward-linked ground will hurry toward harvest
pw_ward_offering_eitr_description: imbue the ward with refined Eitr, and plants will take root where the land would normally refuse them
pw_ward_offering_dragonegg_description: present a dragon egg after Moder has fallen, and her power will pass to players on ward-linked ground
pw_ward_offering_coins_description: pay the trader’s price to summon a Valkyrie for a flight to Haldor
pw_ward_offering_hildirchest_description: show one of Hildir’s chests to summon a Valkyrie for a flight to Hildir, and the chest will remain with you
pw_ward_offering_hildiritem_description: offer a useful tribute to summon a Valkyrie for a flight to Hildir
pw_ward_offering_bogwitchitem_descriptio: offer a fitting tribute to summon a Valkyrie for a flight to the Bog Witch
pw_permit_no_access: You do not have access to this ward.
pw_ward_expiration_expired: Ward protection expired due to inactivity
pw_ward_expiration_hint: A player with access must interact with the ward to reactivate it.
pw_ward_offering_bossaltar_description: summon a Valkyrie for a flight to
pw_ward_offering_bossaltar_item_consumed: the rite will take the item needed for the flight to the boss altar
pw_ward_offerings_compendium_hint: Offering lore and the list of known offerings are kept in the Valheim Compendium, under the raven icon.
pw_ward_offerings_compendium_intro: A ward answers more than a hand laid on old runes. Bring the right offering, and warded ground may mend, ripen, call down storm, or reveal sky-roads known to the Valkyries. Only offerings known to you are written here.
pw_ward_offerings_taxi_return: The Valkyrie will bring you home when the hour to return comes.
pw_ward_offerings_taxi_oneway: The Valkyrie flies only one way. The sky-road will not lead you back.
pw_tutorial_guardstone_extra: A ward can be more than a lock on doors. With the proper rites and chosen laws, it can bind nearby wards into wider protected ground, watch over a homestead while its keepers are away, and answer offerings with mending, growth, storm, or stranger ways of travel.
pw_se_ward_taxi_flight_tooltip: A Valkyrie carries you along the sky-road. Press $1 to let go, but she will not take you up again.
pw_se_ward_taxi_return_tooltip: The way home remains marked. When this blessing fades, the Valkyrie will carry you back. Starting another passage breaks the mark.
pw_se_ward_taxi_waiting_outbound_tooltip: The offering has been accepted. A Valkyrie will arrive soon.
pw_se_ward_taxi_waiting_retry_tooltip: The Valkyrie waits until you are ready to fly.
pw_se_ward_taxi_falling_tooltip: The Valkyrie has released you. Her blessing slows the fall until you touch land or water.
pw_msg_taxi_already_active: A Valkyrie passage is already open
pw_msg_taxi_return_wait_expired: The Valkyrie waited in vain. The way back is yours to find.
